intro: Artemisia absinthium, also known as wormwood, is a plant-based extract that has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The extract has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and fever, as well as to repel insects and improve mental clarity. However, it's essential to note that artemisia absinthium extract should be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional, as it can be toxic in large quantities and interact with certain medications.
